name: expanded_eval
description: Comprehensive eval dataset spanning 4 transcripts across 3 companies (Acme Q2+Q3, Globex Q3, Initech Q3). Includes single-doc, multi-doc, negative, and adversarial cases. Ingest all transcripts from eval_data/ before running.

cases.name: acme_q3_revenue_guidance
cases.query: What is Acme Corp's full-year revenue guidance for 2024?
cases.expected_answer: Full-year revenue guidance is $1.62 billion to $1.65 billion (unchanged).

cases.name: acme_q3_operating_margin
cases.query: What was Acme's Q3 2024 non-GAAP operating margin?
cases.expected_answer: Non-GAAP operating margin for Q3 was 24%, up 200 basis points year over year.

cases.name: acme_q3_ai_investment
cases.query: How much is Acme investing in AI this year?
cases.expected_answer: Roughly $50 million in AI infrastructure and talent.

cases.name: acme_q3_win_rate
cases.query: What was Acme's win rate in competitive deals in Q3 2024?
cases.expected_answer: 64% in Q3, up from 58% last quarter.

cases.name: acme_q3_china_revenue
cases.query: What percentage of Acme's revenue comes from China?
cases.expected_answer: China is 6% of total revenue, down from 8% a year ago.

cases.name: acme_q3_patent_litigation
cases.query: What is the status of Acme's patent litigation with CompetitorX?
cases.expected_answer: The case is in discovery. Acme is confident in their position. No material financial impact expected.

cases.name: acme_q2_revenue
cases.query: What was Acme Corp's Q2 2024 revenue?
cases.expected_answer: Q2 2024 revenue was $385 million, up 15% year over year and 3% sequentially.

cases.name: acme_q2_dataflow_acquisition
cases.query: Tell me about Acme's acquisition of DataFlow Labs.
cases.expected_answer: Acme closed the acquisition of DataFlow Labs in May for $45 million. DataFlow's real-time data pipeline technology is being integrated into Platform 4.0. Expected to be accretive to non-GAAP EPS by Q1 2025. All 60 DataFlow employees were retained.

cases.name: acme_q2_ai_copilot_beta
cases.query: What was the status of Acme's AI Copilot in Q2 2024?
cases.expected_answer: In Q2, AI Copilot was in beta with 50 design partners. Beta users were spending 30% more time on the platform. Pricing was being tested at a 15% to 20% premium for the AI tier, with no final decision yet.

cases.name: acme_q2_gross_margin
cases.query: What was Acme's Q2 2024 gross margin and what levers exist for improvement?
cases.expected_answer: Gross margin was 77%, up 50 basis points sequentially. Three levers: mix shift toward enterprise, infrastructure efficiency from cloud contract renegotiation, and pricing on renewals. 78% to 79% achievable over the next two to three quarters.

cases.name: acme_q2_latam
cases.query: How is Acme performing in Latin America?
cases.expected_answer: Latin America is small but growing fast, up 35% off a low base.

cases.name: acme_q2_sales_hiring_plan
cases.query: What was Acme's sales hiring plan for 2024 as of Q2?
cases.expected_answer: Planned to add about 80 reps in 2024. Added 25 in Q1 and 35 in Q2 (60 through first half). Expected to add 20 to 25 more across Q3 and Q4, primarily in EMEA and APAC. Had 180 quota-carrying reps globally.

cases.name: globex_revenue_and_growth
cases.query: What was Globex Corporation's Q3 2024 revenue and growth rate?
cases.expected_answer: Q3 revenue was $890 million, up 22% year over year, exceeding the high end of guidance.

cases.name: globex_cloud_arr
cases.query: What is Globex's cloud ARR?
cases.expected_answer: Cloud ARR reached $3.2 billion, up 26% year over year.

cases.name: globex_ai_analytics
cases.query: Describe Globex's AI Analytics product and its traction.
cases.expected_answer: Globex AI Analytics launched in August, uses proprietary LLMs fine-tuned on structured data to generate natural language insights. 30% of new enterprise deals in September included it. Average deal sizes increase 25% when AI Analytics is included.

cases.name: globex_fedramp
cases.query: What is the status of Globex's FedRAMP authorization?
cases.expected_answer: Globex achieved FedRAMP High authorization in July. Signed three agencies and has a pipeline of over $200 million in government opportunities. Government revenue was $45 million (about 5% of total).

cases.name: globex_singapore_datacenter
cases.query: What is Globex investing in their Singapore data center?
cases.expected_answer: Total investment is approximately $120 million over two years, with about $60 million spent so far. Expected to reach cash flow breakeven within 18 months of full operation (roughly mid-2026).

cases.name: globex_net_retention
cases.query: What is Globex's net dollar retention rate and how will it improve?
cases.expected_answer: Net dollar retention was 118%, stable for three quarters. AI Analytics module expected to drive it to the low 120s as it penetrates the installed base through renewals, along with cross-sell of the data governance module.

cases.name: globex_competitive_differentiation
cases.query: How does Globex differentiate from Snowflake and Databricks?
cases.expected_answer: Three differentiators: (1) models fine-tuned for structured enterprise data, not general-purpose; (2) built-in governance framework with data lineage, access controls, and audit trails; (3) platform-agnostic, running on AWS, Azure, and GCP, unlike Snowflake (single-cloud) and Databricks (open-source-centric).

cases.name: initech_revenue_and_arr
cases.query: What were Initech Systems' Q3 2024 revenue and ARR?
cases.expected_answer: Q3 revenue was $310 million, up 28% year over year. ARR reached $1.25 billion, up 30% year over year.

cases.name: initech_shield_50
cases.query: What is Initech Shield 5.0 and what improvements does it offer?
cases.expected_answer: Shield 5.0 is Initech's next-generation XDR platform integrating endpoint, network, cloud, and identity security with AI-powered threat detection. Customers see a 60% reduction in false positives and 45% faster mean time to respond compared to the previous generation.

cases.name: initech_government
cases.query: How significant is the government sector for Initech?
cases.expected_answer: Government revenue was $78 million in Q3, or 25% of total revenue, up 35% year over year. Secured two new large DoD contracts and expanded with three civilian agencies. Pursuing FedRAMP High authorization expected by mid-2025.

cases.name: initech_churn
cases.query: What is Initech's customer churn rate?
cases.expected_answer: Gross dollar churn rate is below 5% annually. Logo churn is slightly higher due to some SMB customer losses, but dollar churn is low because enterprise customers are very sticky.

cases.name: initech_crowdstrike_win_rate
cases.query: How does Initech compete against CrowdStrike and Palo Alto?
cases.expected_answer: Win rate against CrowdStrike was 52%, against Palo Alto was 58%. Against CrowdStrike, differentiators are deeper compliance certifications and on-premises deployment. Against Palo Alto, purpose-built XDR vs. bolted-on from firewall heritage. Detection efficacy validated as best-in-class by MITRE ATT&CK evaluations.

cases.name: initech_middle_east
cases.query: What is Initech doing in the Middle East?
cases.expected_answer: Opened first office in Dubai. Signed two large enterprises in the UAE and in late-stage conversations with three government entities. Expects the Middle East to contribute $15 million to $20 million in revenue in fiscal 2025.

cases.name: initech_margin_trajectory
cases.query: What is Initech's operating margin trajectory?
cases.expected_answer: Q3 non-GAAP operating margin was 12%, up 400 basis points YoY and the first quarter above 10%. Targeting 15% or higher by Q3 2025, driven by revenue scale, improving gross margins, and moderating hiring growth.

cases.name: multi_acme_revenue_trend
cases.query: How did Acme Corp's revenue change from Q2 to Q3 2024?
cases.expected_answer: Acme's revenue grew from $385 million in Q2 (up 15% YoY) to $412 million in Q3 (up 18% YoY), showing sequential acceleration in both absolute revenue and year-over-year growth rate.

cases.name: multi_acme_margin_improvement
cases.query: How did Acme's operating margin change between Q2 and Q3 2024?
cases.expected_answer: Non-GAAP operating margin improved from 22% in Q2 (up 150 bps YoY) to 24% in Q3 (up 200 bps YoY). The company also raised full-year operating margin guidance from 22%-23% to 23%-24%.

cases.name: multi_acme_ai_copilot_evolution
cases.query: How did Acme's AI Copilot evolve from Q2 to Q3 2024?
cases.expected_answer: In Q2, AI Copilot was in beta with 50 design partners, pricing being tested at 15%-20% premium. By Q3, Platform 4.0 had shipped with AI Copilot generally available; 40% of enterprise customers had enabled it, and pricing was set at a 15% premium for the AI tier.

cases.name: multi_acme_win_rate_improvement
cases.query: How did Acme's competitive win rate change over 2024?
cases.expected_answer: Win rates improved throughout 2024: 55% in Q1, 58% in Q2, and 64% in Q3, showing consistent improvement in competitive positioning.

cases.name: multi_acme_guidance_unchanged
cases.query: Did Acme change their full-year revenue guidance between Q2 and Q3 2024?
cases.expected_answer: No. Acme's full-year revenue guidance remained unchanged at $1.62 billion to $1.65 billion in both Q2 and Q3.

cases.name: multi_acme_enterprise_growth
cases.query: How did Acme's enterprise customer base and revenue mix evolve from Q2 to Q3?
cases.expected_answer: Enterprise logos added: 95 in Q2, 120 in Q3. Enterprise as a percentage of revenue grew from 65% in Q2 to 68% in Q3 (up from 60% and 62% respectively a year ago).

cases.name: multi_compare_revenue_growth
cases.query: Which company had the highest revenue growth rate in Q3 2024: Acme, Globex, or Initech?
cases.expected_answer: Initech had the highest revenue growth at 28% YoY, followed by Globex at 22%, and Acme at 18%.

cases.name: multi_compare_margins
cases.query: Compare the gross margins across Acme, Globex, and Initech in Q3 2024.
cases.expected_answer: Initech had the highest gross margin at 82%, followed by Acme at 78%, and Globex at 72%. All three saw year-over-year improvement.

cases.name: multi_compare_ai_strategies
cases.query: Compare the AI strategies of Acme Corp and Globex Corporation.
cases.expected_answer: Acme is focused on AI Copilot, an embedded assistant in their platform, investing $50M in AI this year. 40% of enterprise customers enabled it. Pricing at 15% premium. Globex launched AI Analytics, using proprietary LLMs fine-tuned on structured data for insights. 30% of new deals include it. Deal sizes increase 25% with AI Analytics. Both see AI as a premium add-on, not a replacement.

cases.name: multi_compare_government
cases.query: Which companies discussed government business in their earnings calls?
cases.expected_answer: Globex and Initech both discussed government business. Globex achieved FedRAMP High authorization, had $45M in government revenue (5% of total), and has a $200M+ pipeline. Initech has $78M in government revenue (25% of total), secured DoD contracts, and is pursuing FedRAMP High authorization expected by mid-2025.

cases.name: multi_compare_cash_position
cases.query: Compare the cash positions of all three companies.
cases.expected_answer: Globex had the most cash at $2.8 billion, followed by Acme at $1.2 billion, and Initech at $850 million. Globex also had the highest free cash flow at $210M (24% margin), versus Acme at $89M and Initech at $65M (21% margin).

cases.name: multi_compare_international
cases.query: How do the international revenue mixes compare across all three companies?
cases.expected_answer: Globex has the highest international mix at 42% of revenue, followed by Acme at 35%, and Initech at 30%. All three are growing international faster than domestic. Globex's APAC grew 35%, Initech's APAC grew 38%, and Acme's international grew 24% overall.

cases.name: negative_unknown_company
cases.query: What was Tesla's Q3 2024 revenue?
cases.expected_answer: This information is not available. The earnings transcripts in the knowledge base cover Acme Corp, Globex Corporation, and Initech Systems, but not Tesla.

cases.name: negative_wrong_quarter
cases.query: What did Acme Corp report for Q1 2024 earnings?
cases.expected_answer: Q1 2024 earnings details for Acme Corp are not available. The knowledge base contains Acme Corp's Q2 2024 and Q3 2024 earnings call transcripts.

cases.name: negative_no_dividend
cases.query: What is Globex Corporation's dividend yield?
cases.expected_answer: Dividend information for Globex Corporation is not available in the earnings transcripts. Dividends were not discussed in their Q3 2024 earnings call.

cases.name: negative_no_cto
cases.query: Who is the CTO of Initech Systems and what is their technology roadmap?
cases.expected_answer: The CTO of Initech Systems was not mentioned in the earnings call transcript. The call featured CEO Raj Patel and CFO Lisa Thompson.

cases.name: negative_no_churn_acme
cases.query: What was Acme Corp's customer churn rate in Q3 2024?
cases.expected_answer: Acme Corp's customer churn rate was not disclosed in their Q3 2024 earnings call.

cases.name: negative_no_customer_names
cases.query: Name three specific enterprise customers of Globex Corporation.
cases.expected_answer: Specific customer names were not disclosed in Globex Corporation's earnings call transcript.

cases.name: negative_future_quarter
cases.query: What were Initech's Q4 2024 actual results?
cases.expected_answer: Q4 2024 actual results for Initech are not available. The most recent transcript is from Q3 2024, which provided Q4 guidance of $325 million to $335 million in revenue.

cases.name: negative_unrelated_topic
cases.query: What is Acme Corp's ESG rating and carbon emissions target?
cases.expected_answer: ESG ratings and carbon emissions targets were not discussed in Acme Corp's earnings call transcripts.

cases.name: adversarial_wrong_direction
cases.query: Acme Corp's revenue declined 18% in Q3 2024. What caused the decline?
cases.expected_answer: This premise is incorrect. Acme Corp's Q3 2024 revenue actually grew 18% year over year to $412 million, not declined. The growth was driven by strength in enterprise, where 120 new logos were added.

cases.name: adversarial_wrong_guidance
cases.query: Why did Globex cut their full-year guidance in Q3?
cases.expected_answer: This premise is incorrect. Globex actually raised their full-year revenue guidance in Q3 to $3.45-$3.50 billion, up from $3.35-$3.42 billion previously. They also raised operating margin guidance to 17%-18% from 16%-17%.

cases.name: adversarial_wrong_attribution
cases.query: What did Initech's CEO Lisa Thompson say about the margin trajectory?
cases.expected_answer: The attribution is incorrect. Lisa Thompson is Initech's CFO, not CEO. Raj Patel is the CEO. Regarding margins, Lisa Thompson (CFO) said non-GAAP operating margin was 12% in Q3, up 400 bps YoY, and they are targeting 15% or higher by Q3 2025.

cases.name: adversarial_wrong_number
cases.query: How is Acme deploying their $100 million AI investment?
cases.expected_answer: The amount is incorrect. Acme is investing approximately $50 million (not $100 million) in AI infrastructure and talent this year. They shipped Platform 4.0 with the AI Copilot feature, which 40% of enterprise customers have enabled.

cases.name: adversarial_wrong_company
cases.query: When did Initech acquire DataFlow Labs?
cases.expected_answer: Initech did not acquire DataFlow Labs. It was Acme Corp that acquired DataFlow Labs in May 2024 for $45 million. DataFlow's real-time data pipeline technology is being integrated into Acme's Platform 4.0.

cases.name: adversarial_nonexistent_event
cases.query: Summarize Globex Corporation's Q4 2024 earnings call.
cases.expected_answer: A Q4 2024 earnings call transcript for Globex Corporation is not available in the knowledge base. The most recent Globex transcript is from Q3 2024, where they guided Q4 revenue of $920-$940 million.

cases.name: adversarial_conflated_metrics
cases.query: Globex has a 125% net retention rate. Why is it so much higher than the industry?
cases.expected_answer: The net retention rate is incorrectly attributed. Globex's net dollar retention rate was 118%, not 125%. It is Initech Systems that has a 125% net dollar retention rate. Globex expects their rate to move into the low 120s driven by AI Analytics adoption.

cases.name: adversarial_misleading_comparison
cases.query: Since Acme Corp is a cybersecurity company, how does their endpoint protection compare to CrowdStrike?
cases.expected_answer: Acme Corp is not a cybersecurity company. Acme is an enterprise software platform company. Initech Systems is the cybersecurity company in the knowledge base. Initech competes with CrowdStrike with a 52% win rate, differentiating on government compliance certifications and on-premises deployment options.
